title: Hardware In The Loop
subtitle: HITL avionics board for sensor, actuator, power, and communication emulation
role: Schematic design, responsible engineering, and PCB layout design
stackup: Stackup to be added from the Altium layer stack manager or fabrication package
summary: A hardware-in-the-loop PCB project for Yellow Jacket Space Program that combines power conversion, CM5-based control, communications, ADC/DAC signal paths, sensor emulation, valve outputs, detonator interfaces, and switched power outputs.
mainConstraints: Emulate multiple avionics sensor and actuator interfaces from one board
Keep power conversion and low-level analog measurement paths understandable during bring-up
Expose communication paths including Ethernet, USB, CAN, RS-485, and SPI
Document the design from exported Altium artifacts without parsing raw schematic or PCB files
publicNote: This project is derived from the exported Altium schematic PDF only. Raw .SchDoc and .PcbDoc files are not parsed by this portfolio.

model3d.title: Hardware In The Loop 3D Model
model3d.description: Add an Altium STEP export under content/projects/hardware-in-the-loop/model to replace the interactive placeholder.

pages.title: Exported Schematic PDF
pages.description: The exported Altium schematic PDF with its native page navigation and sheet links.
